title: The 47 Ronin
writer: Kenichiro Hara, Seika Mayama, Yoshikata Yoda
actors: Chôjûrô Kawarasaki, Yoshizaburo Arashi, Utaemon Ichikawa
plot: The legendary Forty-seven ronin plot to avenge the death of their lord, Asano Naganori, by killing Kira Yoshinaka, a shogunate official responsible for Asano being forced to commit seppuku.
